case_title: MENDOZA, ARACELIA VS THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,187.43 FILED BY MENDOZA, ARACELIA AS TO DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-15-2005 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. PLAINTIFF IS NOT THE REGISTERED OWNER OF THE SUBJECT VEHICLE AND IS THEREFORE PRECLUDED FROM RECOVERING FOR ITS PROPERTY DAMAGES. THE VEHICLE IS REGISTERED TO MICHAEL WATERS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
